title: Laborer, Carpenter, Equipment Operators
description:
Verceles Construction is growing and looking for motivated, dependable team members to join our crew!

We’re hiring experienced:

* Carpenters
* General Laborers
* Equipment Operators (preferred)
* Skilled Trades

Requirements:
✔ Reliable transportation
✔ Strong work ethic & positive attitude
✔ Construction experience preferred
✔ Ability to work throughout the Tahoe and Sierra region

We offer competitive pay based on experience and opportunities for long-term growth.
application_instructions:
Please apply by emailing Jonathan Verceles at 
info@vercelesconstruction.com with your experience and contact information.

title: Bartender
description: Provides prompt, courteous beverage service to guests, while following all DepartmentService Standards and Bar Policies

title: On-Call Server
description: The On-Call Server is responsible for providing exceptional food and beverage service to guests in a fast-paced, high-end dining environment. This role ensures all guests receive prompt, courteous, and efficient service while maintaining the highest standards of hospitality and compliance with company and regulatory guidelines.

title: Concessions Barback (American Century Championship)
description:
The Concessions Barback plays a key role in supporting bartenders and ensuring efficient beverage service during the American Century Championship. This seasonal, event-based position is responsible for stocking bar supplies, replenishing inventory, maintaining a clean and organized work area, and assisting with setup and breakdown. The ideal candidate is dependable, energetic, and thrives in a fast-paced, high-volume event environment while delivering excellent guest service. 

This is a seasonal role from July 6, 2026, and will end on July 12, 2026

title: Guest Services Event Staff
description: As a member of the Guest Services Event Staff Team, you will be an essential part of the Guest experience and help build memories that last a lifetime. In this role, you will wear many different hats and have the potential to work in several different areas of the arena. Responsibilities will include, but not be limited to, ushering, ticket scanning, concourse customer service, and greeter. You will have the opportunity to assist our guests by offering directions and sharing information while creating a world-class experience. Your job will be to keep our fans safe and informed while still maintaining a fun and friendly atmosphere.

title: Customer Service / Lot Attendant
location: 1105 Emerald Bay Road, South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150
description:
Are you a people person? Do you love helping others? U-Haul is in search of friendly, motivated people for the position of Customer Service Representative. As a Customer Service Representative, you will work as part of a supportive team to be the face of U-Haul company’s exceptional service and ensuring that customers get all the help they need on their journeys by inspecting and maintaining equipment. As well as assisting customers, using up-to-date technology to dispatch and return equipment. This position offers on-the-job education.

Our motto is 'Hire Fast, Pay Fast.' You can start today and get paid today! Schedule two hands-on working interviews and get paid for each. We also offer a $100 hiring bonus! In addition, we offer a $300 cash bonus, paid upon completion of U-Haul Equipment Inspection and Verification through our 1-2-3 Punch Certification Program at retail stores.

title: Front Desk Clerk
description:
Responsibilities:

Perform a friendly, professional, and timely manner check in and checkout processes for arrivals and departures
Assigns guest accommodations in accordance with procedures and SOPs. Maintains room availability and reports any issues to supervision.
 Handles assigned bank in accordance with established internal controls properly and performs accurately account postings to guest folios.
 Maintains knowledge of hotel occupancy status, special events, in-house groups, and other situations affecting the reception desk's daily operation.
 Processes guest payments and accounts upon checkout in an efficient, timely, and accurate manner.
Able to articulate amenities menu and process guests' orders and make reservations on behalf of the guest
Maintains guest folios, ensuring all room charges and credits are recorded in a timely manner.
Processes guest payments and accounts upon checkout in an efficient, timely, and accurate manner.
Brings any problems to the attention of the manager or supervisor on duty.
Must be able to wear a face mask during shift.
Performs related duties as assigned.

title: Grocery Team Member (Stocker, Inventory, Floor Service, Customer Service)
location: 3600 Lake Tahoe Blvd, South Lake Tahoe CA 96150
description: Provides support as a member of the Grocery team to include receiving and preparing product, maintaining the grocery floor and displays, and selling product in support of WFM standards. Performs all functions related to breaking down deliveries and stocking shelves. All Whole Foods Market Retail jobs require ensuring a positive company image by providing courteous, friendly, and efficient service to customers and Team Members at all times. All positions must be performed in accordance with team and store Standard Operating Procedures. Further, Team Members must be prepared and able to perform the duties inherent in other Team Member job descriptions. All positions must strive to support WFM core values and goals, promote national, regional, and store programs and initiatives, and ensure adherence to all applicable health and safety regulations including Food Safety and regulatory duties required in the department.

title: Multi-purpose Clerk (Bakery)
location: 1020 Al Tahoe Blvd, South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150
description: Receive, inspect, and log products for accuracy of shipment and quality; prepare, weigh, package, and label products for display; stock, rotate, and merchandise baked goods and deli products to maintain freshness and department appeal; take special orders for items such as cakes and party trays; may operate equipment such as ovens, proofers, slicers, and mixers; keep all areas and equipment of the department clean

title: Associate
location:
2061 LAKE TAHOE BLVD
SO LAKE TAHOE, California, 96150
description: The Part-Time Associate reports to the Store Manager and performs management-assigned duties, which may include but may not be limited to receiving inventory, stocking and maintaining a store section, operating a cash register, carry-out services and store cleaning.

title: Bussers/Hosts
description:
Are you interested in working in a fast paced and social environment? Come in to Bert's Cafe- We are currently hiring bussers and hosts. Must be willing to work mornings and weekends. Looking for friendly, hard working, high energy individuals that are great at multi-tasking and are looking to be part of one of Tahoe's best teams.

Hours of operation: 7:00-2:00 (schedule varies but usually around 7-3:00)
Minimum wage + great tips + 401k
People friendly / presentable / reliable / capable / team player - All things we are looking for in a new-hire.
application_instructions: Must apply in person at 1146 Emerald Bay Road in South Lake Tahoe at the 'Y'.

title: Construction Laborer
description:
General Construction Laborer. Salary based on experience.
Must have own vehicle, preferably a truck, and hand tools

Hours of work: 7:30 AM to 4 PM.

Will train right person.
application_instructions: CALL OFFICE FOR INQUIRY AT (530) 573-1194. No emails.

title: Valet Attendant
location: 900 Ski Run Boulevard, South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150
description: As a Valet Attendant at Riva Grill you are the first impression! You will provide exceptional valet parking services by safely and efficiently moving guest vehicles to a designated parking location and assisting them in a friendly, efficient, courteous and professional manner. You may also assist with loading and unloading.

title: Crew Member
location: 3101 Harrison Avenue, South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150
description: We make delicious SANDWICHES! Join our team at our busy store. You will be responsible in preparing delicious sandwiches for our customers. We are looking for the ideal crew member who is experienced, pleasant, and committed! If you are a people person and provide excellent customer service, we want to hear from you!

title: Retail Sales Associate
description: We are seeking a customer-focused individual with strong communication skills who enjoys engaging with customers. This position is ideal for candidates balancing multiple jobs or those unable to commit to a full weekly schedule.

title: Marina Assistant
location: 4041 Lakeshore Boulevard, South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150
description:
POSITION SUMMARY/PURPOSE: These are key positions within Marina Operations, with direct daily contact with our Marina Guests.

All Marina Staff Members are required to have a State issued boating license or obtain one within their first week of employment.

title: Jet Ski and Water Toy Rentals Attendant
company: Tahoe Sports - Ski Run Boat Company
description: We are looking for fun and outgoing people with positive attitudes to help us show the Visitors of Lake Tahoe a great time on the water! No experience is necessary with any position but people with good organizational skills and great work ethics have the most success. This is a great opportunity to learn more about Water Sports Activities in a fun work environment!

title: Barista/Bartender
description: We are seeking a hardworking, friendly, and experienced barista who is passionate about coffee and providing excellent customer service. The ideal candidate enjoys meeting people from all over the world and is comfortable working independently.

title: Service Specialist (Grocery Bagger)
description: The Service Specialist is an excellent entry level store position, with many opportunities for growth and learning within our Save Mart family of businesses in the grocery industry. Our Service Specialists play an important role in the efficient operations of the front-end, by providing friendly, fast and effective customer service. Your goal as a Service Specialist is to create a friendly, welcoming, and helpful store atmosphere, establishing loyal repeat customers.

title: Multi-purpose Clerk (Meat)
description: The Meat Clerk ensures that our customers’ needs are met and exceeded by delivering remarkable customer service and providing customers with exceptional product knowledge, efficient service and a friendly attitude. The Meat Clerk is responsible for providing a high level of customer service and practicing safe food handling procedures. This position supports the Meat department by performing tasks such as greeting and assisting customers with questions, promoting sales within the department, preparing, packaging, labeling, and merchandising products, maintaining department standards, and assisting customer requests and special orders. The Meat Clerk handles all products in a safe, sanitary manner and keeps all areas and equipment of the department clean.

title: Food Truck Assistant
description:
The Food Truck Assistant supports the Food Truck and Events Lead in operating the Food Truck at our
Brewery location. This role focuses on food preparation, event support, transportation of supplies,
maintaining high standards of food safety and cleanliness and providing customer service. The ideal
candidate is organized, reliable, and passionate about delivering exceptional food experiences to our
guests.

title: Production Associate
description:
South Lake Brewing Company is looking to hire a Production Associate to assist in helping run the
brewing and cellaring operations. This is an entry level position, no prior experience is required. This
opportunity is perfect for someone excited to learn about and get a foot-in-the-door into the brewing
industry. This person will report to Chris Smith, Co-Owner and Director of Operations and will also
receive daily task direction from the Operations Team members.

title: Kitchen Help
description: Minimum 16yrs old, have excellent customer service skills, must be able to work Sunday, Monday and Tuesdays 4:00 to Close.

title: Cashier/Customer Service
description: Under the general supervision of the Store Manager and Area Manager, the Customer Service Representative (CSR) supports daily store operations while upholding the company’s commitment to exceptional customer service. This role is responsible for cashiering, maintaining store presentation, ensuring food and beverage quality, and fostering a safe and welcoming environment for all customers.

title: Cedar Bath Maintenance Laborer
description:
Overview

The Employee shall perform a variety of duties related to manual labor and maintenance tasks, as responsibilities reasonably associated with their position. The duties of the employee include, but are not limited to, the following:

Responsibilities

Cedar Bath Maintenance: The Employee will ensure proper maintenance of the cedar baths, which consists of manually pushing a 40 pound agitation machine. This task is integral to the day-to-day upkeep of the baths and must be performed with care and consistency.

Cleaning and Laundry: The employee will be responsible for maintaining cleanliness in designated areas and handling laundry services as assigned.

Material Handling: The employee will manage the pick up and delivery of materials as needed for business operations, ensuring that items are handled efficiently and safely.
This position offers an opportunity for growth within a supportive environment where your skills can be utilized effectively while contributing to the success of our operations.
application_instructions: Email resume to Tim at tahoeforestbaths@gmail.com

title: Retail Merchandise Associate
description: Responsible for delivering a highly satisfied customer experience proven by engaging and interacting with all customers, embodying customer experience principles and philosophy, and maintaining a clean and organized store environment. Adheres to all operational, merchandise, and loss prevention standards. May be cross-trained to work in multiple areas of the store in order to support the needs of the business.

title: Building Operations Attendant
description: The Building Operations Attendant is an event-driven support position that works in the areas of housekeeping, show care, room sets, event teardown, arena conversions, and grounds maintenance at the Tahoe Blue Event Center.

title: Assistant Marketing & Merchandise Manager
description:
South Lake Brewing Company is looking to hire an Assistant Merchandise and Marketing Manager! This
manager would report directly to Jenna Brown, the Merchandise and Marketing Manager at South Lake
Brewing Company. The Assistant Marketing & Merchandise Manager would work at both taproom
locations: The Brewery at 1920 Lake Tahoe Blvd, and The Libation Lodge at 4000 Lake Tahoe Blvd.
This job will require the availability of up to 20 hours a week, with possible seasonal fluctuations.

description: Are you a friendly and outgoing individual with a passion for creating memorable guest experiences? Join our team as a Front Desk Agent and be the welcoming face of our establishment. As a Front Desk Agent, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring our guests feel valued and cared for from the moment they arrive.

description: This role is responsible for providing friendly, excellent service to every customer who approaches the bar.  Prepares and pours drinks for customers and cocktail servers.  Handles all cash transactions accurately.

title: Slots Attendant
description: The Slot Attendant is responsible for delivering a high level of guest service, including assisting guests with player accounts and jackpot payouts.

title: Barista
description: The Barista is responsible for preparing and serving beverage and food items, coordinating service with team members, and following department procedures to deliver a high level of guest service.

title: Spa Attendant
description:
Responsibilities: 

Issues locker and locker keys.
Collects soiled linens and delivers them to the laundry room on a daily basis. Picks up clean linens on a daily basis.
Maintains stock items for the health spa.
Demonstrates operation and explains purpose of exercise equipment.
Processes memberships and inputs into computer database.
Answers phone calls and schedules spa service appointments.
Collects fees and processes transactions for use of facilities, services, and retail merchandise.
Follows the Customer Service Model at all times.
Other related duties as assigned.

title: Bartender
description: The Bartender is responsible for preparing and serving beverages, coordinating service with team members, and following departmental procedures to deliver a high level of guest service.

title: Cook II
description: The Cook II is responsible for executing all aspects of food preparation and cooking while adhering to company standards and quality expectations.

title: Host Person

title: Host Person
description: The Host Person – Café Del Soul is responsible for greeting and seating restaurant guests and processing sales transactions to support a smooth dining experience.

title: Ground Crew Member
description:
Join our team at Sierra Crest Tree Service as a Ground Crew, where you'll be an essential part of our tree service operations. Daily duties will involve working with the team to accomplish the services we provide including tree removals, tree trimming and defensible space. 

We’ve built a solid crew and we’re protective of that culture. We’re not just looking for someone who can do the work — we’re looking for someone who fits in and makes the job better for everyone.

Feel free to give us a call to chat (Leo at (530) 721-8969) and/or fill out our form on our careers tab on our website: https://www.sierracresttreeservice.com/careers

title: Dishwasher
description: Join our dynamic hospitality team as a Dishwasher, where you'll play a vital role in maintaining a clean, organized, and efficient kitchen environment. Your energetic and proactive approach will ensure that dishes, utensils, and kitchen equipment are spotless and ready for service, supporting our culinary staff in delivering exceptional dining experiences. This paid position offers an exciting opportunity to gain valuable experience in food service, catering, and hospitality operations while working in a lively, team-oriented atmosphere.

title: Part-Time Associate
description: The Part-Time Associate reports to the Store Manager and performs management-assigned duties, which may include but may not be limited to receiving inventory, stocking and maintaining a store section, operating a cash register, carry-out services and store cleaning.

title: Waitperson for Summer Banquets
description: Provides prompt, courteous food service to Harrah’s/Caesars Republic banquet guests.

title: Bilingual Instructional Assistant
description:
REPRESENTATIVE DUTIES:
● Assist in the instruction of individual or groups of students; reinforce instruction as directed by the teacher; communicate with students in English and in a designated second language to facilitate the learning process.
● Assist in the administration and scoring of tests and pupil work; assemble student lesson packets; prepare, copy and distribute classroom materials and visual aids.
● Monitor and control student behavior in the classroom and assure health and safety regulations are observed.
● Assist in determining English proficiency of identified students as directed.
● Assist in recording grades and taking roll; distribute and account for textbooks, equipment and other instructional materials.
● Observe reading abilities as assigned; assist students with letter and word pronunciation and recognition; assist students with writing exercises and assignments.
● Provide oral and written translation in parent-teacher conferences or telephone calls with limited or non-English speaking parents; translate notes, letters and other materials as needed.
● Set up and operate audio-visual equipment; operate a variety of classroom and office equipment including a calculator, laminator, copier, paper cutter and computer.
● Maintain a learning environment in a safe, orderly and clean manner; assist in preparing exhibits, displays and bulletin boards.
● Perform assigned clerical duties in support of classroom activities such as answering phones and maintaining records, logs, student folders and files as required.
● Assure the health and safety of students by following established health and safety practices and regulations.
● Monitor and log student attendance and report behavior to teachers as assigned.
● Research, collect, assemble, catalog and distribute resource materials as assigned. ● Promotes a positive and professional environment through respectful communication and cooperation with others.
● Perform related duties as assigned.

title: Housekeeping Room Attendant
description:
*This is a seasonal position that will start on June 1, 2026, and end on September 30, 2026.

Are you detail-oriented and take pride in creating clean and inviting spaces? Join our vibrant hotel or resort as a Room Attendant and play a vital role in ensuring our guests enjoy a comfortable and memorable stay. With high energy and enthusiasm, you will be responsible for maintaining the cleanliness and tidiness of guest rooms, leaving a lasting impression on our guests. From making beds to replenishing amenities, you will contribute to the overall guest satisfaction and contribute to the positive reputation of our establishment. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, have an eye for cleanliness, and take satisfaction in providing exceptional service, this is the perfect opportunity to showcase your skills and become an integral part of our dedicated housekeeping team.

title: Front Desk Agent
description:
*This is a seasonal position that will start on June 1, 2026, and end on September 30, 2026.

As a Front Desk Agent, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring our guests feel valued and cared for from the moment they arrive.

title: Barista
description: We believe in creating a warm and welcoming space where every cup of coffee sparks connection. Every shift is a chance to brighten someone’s day. Whether it’s a warm smile or remembering a favorite order, you create moments that matter.  If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, love engaging with people, and take pride in your work, we’d love to have you on our team.

title: Guest Room Attendant / Housekeeper
description: The Burks Companies is hiring full-time Guest Room Attendants/Housekeepers at a high-profile hotel facility. Team members clean guest rooms to the highest standards, reporting maintenance issues and replacing amenities while delivering friendly, professional service.

title: QA Inspector
description: The Burks Companies is hiring full-time Housekeeping Quality Assurance Inspectors. Inspectors review guest rooms after cleaning to verify they meet the highest cleanliness and presentation standards before guests check in.

title: EVS Attendant / Janitor
description: The Burks Companies is hiring full-time EVS Attendants/Janitors at a Tahoe-area facility. Team members maintain cleanliness in public areas, restrooms, and common spaces to ensure a welcoming and sanitary environment for all guests.

title: Houseman and Driver
description: A hybrid role responsible for both transportation and housekeeping support. Drivers run daily transportation routes while Housemen maintain floor supplies, collect linens, and respond to guest requests in support of the housekeeping department.

title: Seafood Team Memeber (Service Counter)
description: Provides support as a member of the seafood team to include duties related to counter service, stocking, and sanitation in the seafood department. All Whole Foods Market Retail jobs require ensuring a positive company image by providing courteous, friendly, and efficient service to customers and Team Members at all times. All positions must be performed in accordance with team and store Standard Operating Procedures. title: Cookie Crew
description:
Insomnia Cookies is one of the fastest growing, late-night, sweet indulgence companies in the country, and we are set to open our newest store in South Lake Tahoe later this year!  At the present time, we are actively interviewing Cookie Crew for our store located at 4125 Lake Tahoe Blvd, South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150.
 
As a member of the Cookie Crew you are the ultimate Insomniac. Not only are you the point person at the front of the store for interacting with our customers, but you also get to bake all of our awesome Warm and Delicious cookies as well!

title: Vacation House Cleaner
description:
The house cleaner is responsible for cleaning vacation rentals throughout the service region (South Lake Tahoe).

VRA is a local, Tahoe born company. Our work environment is fast paced and result oriented with tremendous opportunity to learn new things, develop your resume, and turn a job into a career. Our focus is to provide awesome jobs which are flexible for you to enjoy Tahoe activities. We need quality people who are motivated in their career endeavors and want to be a part of a special team!

South Lake Tahoe, Stateline, Zephyr Cove, Carson City, Gardnerville / Minden residents welcome!

title: Bartender
description:
Join our vibrant hospitality team as a Bartender, where your energy and passion for exceptional service will create memorable experiences for our guests. In this dynamic role, you will craft and serve a variety of beverages, ensure customer satisfaction, and maintain a lively, welcoming atmosphere. Your expertise in food and beverage service, combined with your ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently, will be key to thriving in this fast-paced environment. Whether working in a fine dining setting, nightclub, or banquet hall, your enthusiasm and professionalism will shine through every interaction.

Submit your resume directly on the California Burger website.

title: Sandwich Artist/Cashier/Supervisor
description: We are seeking a dedicated and enthusiastic Sandwich Maker to join our team in a fast-paced environment. The ideal candidate will have a passion for food preparation and customer service, ensuring that each sandwich is crafted to perfection while maintaining high standards of cleanliness and food safety. This role requires effective time management skills and the ability to work collaboratively within a team.

title: Multiple Positions Available (Seasonal)
description: Multiple seasonal positions available in housekeeping, restaurant, retail, cafe, lodging, shuttles, and more available! Most roles are seasonal from April/May through October/November.

title: Maintenance Technician II - Recreation (Seasonal/Temporary)
description: The City of South Lake Tahoe is recruiting for Maintenance Technician II positions at the NEW Recreation and Aquatics Center. This position plays a key role in supporting daily operations, program set ups, equipment movement, and maintenance to ensure spaces are safe, clean, functional, and ready for public before, during, and after events. This position coordinates with recreation staff, event organizers, and program instructors to meet setup timelines and needs.  Duties include setting up and breaking down chairs, tables, stages, and equipment for various events, rentals, and programs. In addition, this position provides on-site support during events to assist with unexpected needs, layout changes, and minor adjustments.  Hours vary based on event scheduling and include evenings and week-end shifts.

title: Shift Lead
description:
We’re looking for a lead to join our team. This person will work front and back of house, and specialize in an aspect of the business.

This full time position includes a benefits package.

Clean the front and back of house

This is done during the hours that we’re closed, and has no customer interaction.
